steps.title: Track the units
steps.content: The equation $4x+7y=46$ totals cups of tomato sauce. Since $x$ is the number of small containers, $4x$ represents cups in small containers. Since $y$ is the number of large containers, the coefficient $7$ means $7$ cups per large container.

steps.title: Interpret the product
steps.content:
The product $7y$ multiplies the number of cups in each large container by the number of large containers.
$$7\cdot y=(\text{cups per large container})(\text{number of large containers})$$
So $7y$ represents the total cups of tomato sauce in the large containers. The answer is C.
